hero.srOnlyDesc: ATHLEX Training — ATHX training and programming for athletes preparing for ATHX 2026 in Spain and Latin America.
hero.title:
TRAIN
GROW
COMPETE.
hero.subtitle: ATHX Programming™: weekly training plan to prepare for ATHX 2026. Progress tracking and direct chat with your coach.

chat.title: Your coach one message away
chat.body: Questions about technique, scaling, pain — ask freely and get answers from the ATHLEX team the same day.
chat.bubble1: How was your Back Squat today?
chat.bubble2: 5×5 at 110 kg, RPE 7. Had one left.

timer.title: AMRAP, EMOM, For Time
timer.body: Competition modes ready in 2 taps. Beeps per round, screen always awake, and one-handed control.

features.title:
ATHX Programming:
three pillars, zero filler.

items.title: Built for ATHX Games
items.body: Every week and cycle targets the 3 events: Strength, Endurance, and MetCon X. No fluff.

items.title: 4-phase periodization
items.body: BASE, BUILD, PEAK, and DELOAD. Progressive load calibrated by RPE and % 1RM. Science does the work.

items.title: Better than the rest
items.body: The cycle ends with full-event simulations. Initial and final testing to measure real progress.

pricing.headline:
One program.
One price.
features: Warm-up, strength, and MetCon each day

whyChoose.title: Why choose ATHLEX for your ATHX training
items: Real progression: loads go up, times come down.
Logging and leaderboard to track your progress

q1.question: Do I need prior experience?
q1.answer: Yes, prior knowledge is recommended. The program assumes mastery of the movements included this year.

q2.question: What equipment do I need?
q2.answer: Standard box: Olympic barbell, dumbbells, sandbag, box jump, ski-erg, or rowing machine.

q4.question: What's the difference between ATHX and ATHX PRO?
q4.answer: PRO has higher work capacity and workouts tend to run a bit longer.

q5.question: How do I cancel?
q5.answer: From your profile, one click. Cancel anytime. You keep access until the end of your paid period.
